title: thelypteris pubescens
intro: Thelypteris pubescens, also known as the pubescent maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris pubescens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Thelypteris pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
